title: Import Vanilla Saves
description:
Adds a button in the profile select screen to import save data from unmodded profiles. I recommend this over mods like "Vanilla and Modded Saves Merger" because this mod leaves your vanilla saves untouched, so if your save file is corrupted, you can re-import.

[机器翻译]
 在个人资料选择界面中添加了一个按钮，用于从未安装模组的个人资料中导入存档数据。我推荐使用此模组而非 "原版与模组存档合并器" 等模组，因为该模组不会修改你的原版存档，因此如果存档文件损坏，你可以重新导入。

GitHub: https://github.com/Ind-E/ImportVanillaSaves
